name: codeflow-shell
description: CodeFlow Shell — minimal executable wrapper around @codeflow/runtime. v0.2.0-beta.3 (MT-5 single hotfix on top of MT-1..4 bundle): MT-5 = Agent.create() no longer passes `model` to the SDK on ANY API key tier; the resume-time model wire-through (where BUG-SDK-001 actually fires) is preserved. Closes BUG-SDK-007 which QA-014 surfaced as a Cursor backend ACL on ADMIN-class keys that wrongly reuses the 'Cannot use this model' error code. Five of BUG-SDK-001..007 now closed (005 ripgrep noise + 006 reviewer dispatch race tracked separately).
